"kb_status": "Interim", "kb_summary": "Multiple NetApp products incorporate Oracle Java Platform, Standard Edition (Java SE). Java SE versions 11.0.30, 17.0.18, 21.0.10, 25.0.2, and 26 are susceptible to a vulnerability which when successfully exploited could allow unauthenticated attacker with logon to the infrastructure where Oracle Java SE executes to compromise Oracle Java SE. Successful attacks require human interaction from a person other than the attacker.
